purpose: Choose dramatic lighting recipes that fit preserved Tower lobby backgrounds while preserving mobile sprite readability.

lightingFamilies.mood: premium warm threshold, safe dramatic depth
lightingFamilies.fillLight: soft ivory face fill from front-right
lightingFamilies.rimOrBounce: tiny deep navy shape separation inside figure only
risks: can become too polite if contrast is flattened
can over-warm beard if brass spills into all white values
lightingFamilies.promptInstruction: Warm brass key, ivory face hold, subtle deep navy separation, no visible glow outline.
lightingFamilies.qaPassCondition: Face reads at 128px and beard separates from jacket on ivory, burgundy, and deep navy backgrounds.

lightingFamilies.mood: lobby velvet warmth, richer evening concierge presence
lightingFamilies.rimOrBounce: soft burgundy side bounce from camera-right
lightingFamilies.accentColor: burgundy should affect fabric edges more than skin
risks: skin and beard can become red-muddy
sprite can disappear against burgundy lobby panels
lightingFamilies.promptInstruction: Burgundy side bounce stays secondary; ivory face fill remains dominant.
lightingFamilies.qaPassCondition: At 128px, eyes and mustache remain readable and the red side light does not turn facial planes muddy.

lightingFamilies.mood: night lobby depth with premium silhouette
lightingFamilies.keyLight: brass key on face and torso
lightingFamilies.rimOrBounce: narrow deep navy edge separator, not a glow
risks: can become haloing around transparent sprite edge
can make dark coat collapse into deep navy UI
can make Otis feel ominous instead of welcoming
lightingFamilies.promptInstruction: Deep navy rim stays inside the painted form; no outer blue edge or bloom.
lightingFamilies.qaPassCondition: No visible rim halo at 200 percent zoom and coat silhouette remains readable on deep navy background.

lightingFamilies.keyLight: soft brass on face from above/front
lightingFamilies.fillLight: ivory desk-adjacent glow kept below chin
lightingFamilies.rimOrBounce: minimal navy grounding shadow inside figure
lightingFamilies.accentColor: tiny burgundy reflection on sleeve or vest
risks: upward glow can become spooky if it reaches the eyes
prop can obscure belly or hands
tablet glow can accidentally become blue tech lighting
lightingFamilies.promptInstruction: Ivory glow supports the hands and lower beard only; face key remains warm brass.
lightingFamilies.qaPassCondition: No horror underlighting, no blue screen cast, hands and prop remain uncropped.

globalRejectConditions: sprite overall value is muddy or crushed
outer glow, rim halo, or background light spill touches transparent edge
photorealistic portrait rendering or fake-perfect AI model look
identity drift away from approved soft Santa concierge Otis
cropped hands, feet, beard, belly, or props
non-flat chroma background or missing alpha when sprite ingest requires transparency
